seo.title: About Codeverta - Software House and Business Technology Partner
seo.description: Learn about Codeverta, a team of developers, designers, and IT consultants focused on code quality, transparent communication, and measurable business value.
seo.keywords: about Codeverta, software house, technology partner, IT consultant, software development

paragraphs: At Codeverta we believe every organization deserves systems that are stable, secure, and designed to withstand growing scale and complexity.

Our mission is to design and build digital infrastructure and software that is robust, scalable, secure, and maintainable. We prioritize engineering excellence, sound architecture, and long-term quality so that every solution we build can be relied upon to drive innovation and business growth.

description.before: At PT Zenit Technology Solution, we believe innovation should serve a higher purpose. We proudly pledge
description.pledge: more than 3% of our annual net profit
description.after: to support underprivileged cancer patients via

direct.title: Direct Support
direct.description: Helping families cover critical treatment costs.

ethical.title: Ethical Tech
ethical.description: Your projects directly fund social impact.

orgChart.heading: Organizational Structure

ceo.description: Leads the company and defines the long-term vision.

cto.description: Owns technical architecture, technology stack, and engineering quality.

eng.description: Core development team covering frontend, backend, and mobile.

fe.description: Builds user interfaces with React, Vue, and other modern frameworks.

be.description: Develops APIs, business logic, and database management.

mob.description: Develops native or cross-platform apps for iOS and Android.

devops.description: Manages cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and system reliability.

qa.description: Ensures product quality through manual and automated testing.

cpo.description: Defines the product roadmap and prioritizes features based on user data.

pm.description: Manages the backlog, feature priorities, and OKR delivery.

uxd.description: Designs user experience and interfaces using Figma and UX research.

cmo.description: Designs marketing strategy, brand awareness, and user growth.

growth.description: Runs content, SEO, and advertising strategies for user acquisition.

sales.description: Identifies prospects, closes deals, and builds business partnerships.

cfo.description: Manages finance, legal, compliance, and budget planning.

fin.description: Manages bookkeeping, financial reports, tax, and audits.

hr.description: Handles recruitment, onboarding, culture development, and talent retention.

orgChart.description: Our company structure keeps product, engineering, marketing, finance, and people operations aligned so every project moves with clear ownership.

location.heading: Visit Codeverta in Yogyakarta
location.description: Find our office location on Google Maps and get directions when you want to discuss a website, application, LMS, information system, or other IT service project with our team.
